introSection: Diavlo (Japanese: ディアブロ) is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Himeji Central Park in Himeji, Hyōgo, Japan. Opened in July 1994, it is a clone of Batman The Ride at Six Flags Great America and other parks.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Black track with white rails and black supports.

fullText:
Diavlo (Japanese: ディアブロ) is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Himeji Central Park in Himeji, Hyōgo, Japan. Opened in July 1994, it is a clone of Batman The Ride at Six Flags Great America and other parks.



Black track with white rails and black supports.






 * Diavlo on the parks website (Japanese)
